rows.label: tev013201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Maxim about the tragedy on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if Maxim has any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Maxim for his thoughts on Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Maxim for his impression of Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Maxim for his thoughts on Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Maxim about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Earth got caught in the middle of
a war between xenos and was reduced
to dust in the solar winds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Only a lucky few were able to
secure spots on a handful of
interstellar spacecrafts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0003
rows.name:
And the few whose ships actually
made it off Earth safely were
the luckiest of the lucky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0004
rows.name:
When I looked out the window of my
ship, I saw the other crafts being
shot down one after the other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0005
rows.name:
I was heartbroken. And also
frightened, I don't mind telling you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0006
rows.name:
I like to believe that ships
besides the Whale survived, but
I know that's wishful thinking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0009
rows.name:
A Companion named Suriella recently
sat next to me at the diner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0010
rows.name:
She began grilling me with question after question
about how many people lived on Earth, what sort
of civilizations were there, and the like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Perhaps the shock of our crash
landing gave her amnesia?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0012
rows.name:
If so, more's the pity. Bad enough to lose
your home, but to also lose all your memories
of it? I can't imagine anything more tragic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0021
rows.name:
She is a warrior Valkyrie descended from
the heavens to bring salvation to Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Her strength is divine, but it's
her beauty that leaves me with no
better comparison than a goddess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0023
rows.name:
If I possessed the strength to
fight the Growth, I'd sign up
for her team in an eyeblink.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0024
rows.name:
But alas, I am but an artist with the
soul of a poet. If only one could
fight the Growth with pretty words![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0026
rows.name:
If you truly have the will, I can train
you to fight. But I warn you, my regimen
is strict, and I do not tolerate failure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0027
rows.name:
E-Elma! My lady! Nothing would please
me more than to fight at your side![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0028
rows.name:
But alas, my wit is the only weapon I have
mastered. I fear that my place is here, composing
paeans of love to your beauty and skill.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0029
rows.name:
I value actions, not words.
...And I could never return
the love of so hollow a man.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Despite her youth, she's a first-rate
mechanic, as well as a compassionate
person who never ignores a soul in need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0047
rows.name:
I think we all have great
expectations for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0048
rows.name:
If Elma is our warrior Valkyrie, then
Lin is... Um... Her adorable sidekick?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0050
rows.name:
Hey, I know we all pale in comparison to
Elma, but you're making me a SIDEKICK?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0051
rows.name:
Ah! Forgive me, my lady. Allow
me to respectfully name
you...NLA's fairy princess![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0052
rows.name: Aw, you're gonna make me blush![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0069
rows.name:
Hair that sparkles like crystal...
Skin of milky white...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0070
rows.name:
Elma's true form is that of a
shimmering angel! Or perhaps a
mermaid. ...Er, with legs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0071
rows.name:
O muse! Thou has forsaken me! I
fear there is no way of expressing
her beauty in mere words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0072
rows.name:
Still, in this vast universe, there
must be many xenoforms like her. And
yet, on this planet, she is alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0073
rows.name:
It must be so sad for Elma to
be separated so. I hope more
of her kind come here to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0074
rows.name: So who is that Lyvia person, anyway?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0075
rows.name:
She seems some manner of ghastly demon
when compared to Elma's heavenly angel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev013201_MSG0076
rows.name:
She is an absolutely frightful
creature. And you keep some
dismally poor company![ST:wait ]
